description: Sets the object position above sea level. Given position must be in [[Position#PositionASL|PositionASL]] format.
examples: <sqf>player setPosASL [getPosASL player select 0, (getPosASL player select 1) + 10, getPosASL player select 2];</sqf>

<sqf>
_position = getPosASL _object;
_position set [2, 10]; // 10m above sea level
_object setPosASL _position;
</sqf>
name: setPosASL
